texto: ... it is shameful that there are so few women in science... In China there are many, many women in physics. There is a misconception in America that women scientists are all dowdy spinsters. This is the fault of men. In Chinese society, a woman is valued for what she is, and men encourage her to accomplishments yet she remains eternally feminine.
explicacao: Citação de Chien-Shiung Wu sobre enfrentar incertezas com ação. “... it is shameful that there are so few women in science... In China there are many, many women …” articula coragem, america, china em registro de coragem, com relevância para contextos como china e encouragement.
